title: install --update appends catalog migration declarations into the user's migrations.json without surfacing them
description: On a schema version bump, the update path registers the shipped catalog migration chain into the substrate's migrations.json before forward-validating the block, but the install summary does not report which declarations were added. The user's migrations.json is mutated with no surfaced record of the additions.

evidence.reference: resyncSchema registers each shipped migration declaration into migrations.json on a version bump; the install summary does not enumerate the registered declarations

impact: A user cannot see, from the update output, which migration declarations were written into their migrations.json; the mutation is silent.
proposed_resolution: The update output enumerates every migration declaration registered into migrations.json; --dry-run lists them without writing; delivered within the unified update command (FEAT-006).
